name: fsm-chat
description: Real-time chat channel between a technician (FSM mobile app) and a dispatcher (FSM shell app).
//note: This descriptor documents how to register the app inside SAP FSM.
//note2: In the FSM Admin / Extension Management UI you create a Cloud (custom) extension and point it at the deployed URL of this app (e.g. your GitHub Pages URL). The values below mirror the fields you fill in there.

deployment.//: Replace with your actual hosted URL after you push to GitHub.

extensions.//: Screen extension shown inside the FSM MOBILE app (technician).
extensions.title: Chat with Dispatcher

extensions.//: Screen extension shown inside the FSM SHELL app (dispatcher).
extensions.title: Chat with Technician

permissions.//: The app only needs to be embedded and to read the current object/user context.

parameters.//: Placeholders FSM substitutes at launch time. objectId binds both clients to the same conversation (same Service Call => same chat thread).
parameters.ws: OPTIONAL: WebSocket relay URL for true cross-device real-time, e.g. wss://your-relay
